{{CargoOrgan
|name=Sored Fish Tail
|type=Common
|rank=blue
|id=10822
|idx=23
|description=After their habitat was polluted, the beautiful mermaid turned ugly, its once smooth fishtail is now full of fishy pustules.
|skill=
|hp=1194
|def=70
|atk=70
|rush=158
|gene1=Craft 1 Blue Organ Slime: 2.5% chance to get 1 more.
|gene2=Snail Arena, Water DMG +60
|gene3=Tadpole Pond Max Cap +1.5%
|gene7=Craft 1 Blue Organ Slime: 2.5% chance to get 1 more. (Awakened)
|}}
